name: Ark
description: The root level developer command-line and agent harness for managing the codebase.

commands.name: setup
commands.description: Set up the dev environment (install git hooks, etc.)

commands.name: clean
commands.description: Remove generated files and node_modules from all packages

commands.name: pkg-list
commands.description: List all packages with their descriptions

commands.name: pkg-run
commands.description: Run a package CLI: bun ark.ts pkg <name> [command] [args...]

commands.name: lint-format
commands.description: Format files with Biome (pass specific files or omit for all)

commands.name: lint-lint
commands.description: Lint files with Biome without applying fixes

commands.name: lint-fix
commands.description: Lint files and apply safe fixes with Biome

commands.name: lint-check
commands.description: Format, lint, and organize imports with Biome (all-in-one)
